name: Bacon, Walnut & Feta Focaccia
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a skillet until it is crisp.
2. Drain the cooked bacon on paper towels.
3. Crumble the bacon and arrange it on the focaccia.
4. Sprinkle with onion, walnuts, and feta cheese.
5. Place on a baking sheet.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 to 10 minutes, or until the cheese melts and everything is hot.
7. Serve hot.
